llm_result.summary: The case shows pervasive non-belonging across work, friends, and family, with chronic masking and social-exhaustion. The proposed lever-based plan targets modifiable BIO/PSYCHO/SOCIAL predictors and their interactions, emphasizing authentic self-presentation, identity work, social network strengthening, mindfulness, sleep optimization, and measurement-informed feedback. Each lever is designed to move multiple criteria (C01–C06) through clearer role expectations, improved belonging, reduced masking, enhanced self-worth, and better energy management, with feasible timeframes (4–12 weeks) and safety-conscious implementation.

solutions.predictor_variable: Authentic self-expression in work contexts (graded exposure)
solutions.solution_candidate: A 6-8 week program combining cognitive reframing about authenticity, structured exposure in meetings (start with 1 sentence, progress to sharing explicit values), and brief peer feedback to validate authentic contributions.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reduces reliance on masking, increases perceived belonging at work, and lowers exhaustion by aligning behavior with authentic values.
solutions.measurement: Work Belonging Scale scores; count of authentic contributions per meeting; fatigue rating after work interactions (0-10).
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; allow opt-out; monitor distress during disclosure exercises.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S01 to Work_Education_and_Role_Functioning (ID207) and Belonging_Isolation_and_Meaning (ID198); also touches Interpersonal_Effectiveness_and_Relational_Repair (ID109) for feedback mechanisms.

solutions.solution_candidate: A values clarification and self-compassion module aimed at reducing global non-belonging (C06) and easing authenticity pressures (C04), delivered over 6-8 weeks.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Clarifies identity anchors, strengthens self-worth, and reduces need to mask across contexts, improving belonging.
solutions.measurement: Self-Concept Clarity Scale; belongingness ratings across contexts; daily mood diary.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; monitor for rumination; provide grounding prompts.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S02 to Self_and_Identity_Work (149,150) and Meaning_Update (75); aligns with Values_Conflict_and_Moral_Repair_Work (151).

solutions.solution_candidate: Weekly facilitated peer-support circles and targeted buddy system to build a stable supportive network, plus a simple social-network map to identify low-cost belonging opportunities.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Increases accessible belonging across contexts, reduces isolation, and buffers social exhaustion via reliable support.
solutions.measurement: Number of meaningful interactions per week; perceived belonging in friend/work contexts; energy after social time.
solutions.safety_notes: Respect boundaries; voluntary participation; opt-out option at any circle.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S03 to NETWORK_Building_And_Maintenance (199) and Belonging_Isolation_and_Meaning (198).

solutions.predictor_variable: Mindfulness and self-compassion to reduce masking
solutions.solution_candidate: A 4-6 week mindfulness-based and compassion-focused module to increase present-moment awareness and reduce self-criticism during social interactions.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improves emotional regulation, lowers masking frequency, and reduces energy drain from social performances.
solutions.measurement: Perceived masker use (daily self-report), Self-Compassion Scale, fatigue ratings.
solutions.safety_notes: None; monitor for distress if confronted with difficult memories.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S04 to Mindfulness_Based_Interventions (170) and Emotion_Regulation (107).

solutions.solution_candidate: Sleep optimization plan including consistent bedtimes, morning light exposure, and wind-down routines to restore energy and cognitive resources.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Restorative sleep improves energy, mood, and resilience to social stressors, indirectly supporting belonging.
solutions.measurement: Sleep duration/quality (self-report or wearable); morning energy; daytime functioning.
solutions.safety_notes: Caffeine use timing, screen limits; assess for potential sleep disorders; refer if needed.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S05 to Sleep_Circadian_and_Restoration (60-65) and Sleep_Routines_and_Practices (64).

solutions.predictor_variable: Interpersonal relationship repair with family and friends
solutions.solution_candidate: Short-term IPT-style or relational repair coaching to improve acceptance by close others and reduce negative self-evaluation.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improves relational security and reduces self-criticism tied to family/friend judgments, supporting belonging across contexts.
solutions.measurement: IPT global improvement score; family/friend satisfaction; self-reported belonging with close others.
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for escalating family conflict; have safety plan and crisis resources if needed.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S06 to Interpersonal_Therapy_Family (129) and Relationship_Safety (195).

solutions.predictor_variable: Work role clarity and social risk management
solutions.solution_candidate: Supervisor-aligned role clarity and job crafting with boundary setting to reduce role-conflict and social performance pressure.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Decompresses social load at work, enabling authentic behavior without fear of negative evaluation, improving belonging.
solutions.measurement: Role ambiguity scale; supervisor feedback; post-work energy level.
solutions.safety_notes: Respect workplace policies; maintain confidentiality; opt-out if uncomfortable.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S07 to Work_Education_and_Role_Functioning (207) and Role_Transitions (206).

solutions.solution_candidate: Short workshops focused on cultural identity, inclusion, and micro-affirmations to normalize differences and boost belonging.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Normalizes differences and reduces internalized stigma, improving cross-context belonging.
solutions.measurement: Belonging and Inclusion Scale; cross-context belonging ratings.
solutions.safety_notes: Topic sensitivity; provide opt-out; facilitator trained for trauma-informed delivery.

solutions.predictor_variable: Measurement-based care and feedback loop for belonging
solutions.solution_candidate: Digital self-monitoring with daily belonging prompts and weekly feedback to adapt goals.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Data-driven adjustments reinforce awareness and motivate progressive exposure to authentic interactions.
solutions.measurement: Daily belonging ratings; weekly aggregated belonging trajectory; adherence to plan.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S09 to Measurement_Based_Care_and_Feedback (143) and Personalization_Workflows (49).

solutions.predictor_variable: Targeted social activity and small-group engagement
solutions.solution_candidate: Identify 3-4 compatible peer groups and schedule regular small-group activities to build meaningful social ties.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Creates reliable, low-stress social experiences that enhance belonging and energy.
solutions.measurement: Number of group activities per month; self-reported belonging in groups; post-activity energy.
solutions.safety_notes: Respect boundaries; ensure activities are voluntary and safe.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S10 to Social_Support_and_Belonging (198) and Network_Building_And_Maintenance (199).

solutions.predictor_variable: Family/romantic relationship safety planning and boundaries
solutions.solution_candidate: Coaching focused on boundary setting, safe communication, and conflict de-escalation; implement if needed.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reduces relational stress, increases acceptance by close others, enabling authentic behavior with less fatigue.
solutions.measurement: Relationship satisfaction scores; conflict frequency; self-reported belonging with close others.
solutions.safety_notes: If conflict escalates safety concerns, escalate to professional resources.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S11 to Interpersonal_Therapy_Family (129) and Relationship_Safety (195).

solutions.solution_candidate: Cognitive restructuring and compassionate self-relating to reduce internalized negative self-views and mask reliance.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reduces core negative beliefs about self, enabling authentic engagement and reducing masking.
solutions.measurement: Shame/Guilt scales; Self-Esteem measures; mask usage frequency.
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for rumination; provide grounding and support resources.
solutions.mapping_query: MAP S12 to Self_and_Identity_Work (149,150) and Emotion_Regulation (107).
